auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Have I Been Pwned API key sent with the hibp-api-key request header. Buy or view it on the official API key page: https://haveibeenpwned.com/API/Key.

actions.name: get_breach
actions.description: Get one breach by its stable HIBP Name value.

name.description: Stable breach Name value to retrieve from HIBP.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one HIBP breach.

Name.description: Stable breach name returned by HIBP.

Title.description: Display title of the breach returned by HIBP.

Domain.description: Primary domain associated with the breach.

BreachDate.description: Date when the breach occurred in YYYY-MM-DD format.

AddedDate.description: Timestamp when the breach was added to HIBP.

ModifiedDate.description: Timestamp when the breach was last modified in HIBP.

PwnCount.description: Number of breached accounts loaded into HIBP.

Description.description: HTML description of the breach returned by HIBP.

items.description: One compromised data class returned by HIBP.

DataClasses.description: Alphabetically ordered list of compromised data classes.

IsVerified.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as verified.

IsFabricated.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as fabricated.

IsSensitive.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as sensitive.

IsRetired.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as retired.

IsSpamList.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as a spam list.

IsMalware.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as malware-sourced.

IsSubscriptionFree.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as subscription-free.

IsStealerLog.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as sourced from stealer logs.

LogoPath.description: Logo URI or asset path returned by HIBP for the breached service.

anyOf.description: Optional attribution string returned by HIBP.

breach.description: Full breach model returned by Have I Been Pwned.

outputSchema.description: Single breach returned by Have I Been Pwned.

actions.name: get_latest_breach
actions.description: Get the most recently added breach in Have I Been Pwned.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving the latest HIBP breach.

Name.description: Stable breach name returned by HIBP.

Title.description: Display title of the breach returned by HIBP.

Domain.description: Primary domain associated with the breach.

BreachDate.description: Date when the breach occurred in YYYY-MM-DD format.

AddedDate.description: Timestamp when the breach was added to HIBP.

ModifiedDate.description: Timestamp when the breach was last modified in HIBP.

PwnCount.description: Number of breached accounts loaded into HIBP.

Description.description: HTML description of the breach returned by HIBP.

items.description: One compromised data class returned by HIBP.

DataClasses.description: Alphabetically ordered list of compromised data classes.

IsVerified.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as verified.

IsFabricated.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as fabricated.

IsSensitive.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as sensitive.

IsRetired.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as retired.

IsSpamList.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as a spam list.

IsMalware.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as malware-sourced.

IsSubscriptionFree.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as subscription-free.

IsStealerLog.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as sourced from stealer logs.

LogoPath.description: Logo URI or asset path returned by HIBP for the breached service.

anyOf.description: Optional attribution string returned by HIBP.

breach.description: Full breach model returned by Have I Been Pwned.

outputSchema.description: Most recently added breach returned by Have I Been Pwned.

actions.name: get_subscription_status
actions.description: Get the current subscription details for the connected HIBP API key.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving the current HIBP subscription status.

Description.description: Human-readable description of the current subscription.

SubscribedUntil.description: Timestamp when the current subscription expires.

Rpm.description: Allowed requests per minute for breach search APIs.

DomainSearchMaxBreachedAccounts.description: Largest domain search size supported by the current subscription.

anyOf.description: Maximum number of breached domains allowed, or null when unlimited.

IncludesStealerLogs.description: Whether the subscription includes stealer log APIs.

IncludesBulkDomainAdd.description: Whether the subscription includes bulk domain add APIs.

IncludesAutoSubdomainVerification.description: Whether the subscription includes automatic subdomain verification.

IncludesCustomerDomains.description: Whether the subscription allows adding customer domains.

IncludesKAnon.description: Whether the subscription includes the k-anonymity breach search API.

subscription.description: Subscription status returned by Have I Been Pwned.

outputSchema.description: Subscription details returned by Have I Been Pwned.

actions.name: list_breaches
actions.description: List breaches in Have I Been Pwned and optionally filter by domain or spam-list flag.

domain.description: Optional domain filter passed to the HIBP breaches endpoint.

isSpamList.description: Optional spam-list filter passed to the HIBP breaches endpoint.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing breaches from Have I Been Pwned.

Name.description: Stable breach name returned by HIBP.

Title.description: Display title of the breach returned by HIBP.

Domain.description: Primary domain associated with the breach.

BreachDate.description: Date when the breach occurred in YYYY-MM-DD format.

AddedDate.description: Timestamp when the breach was added to HIBP.

ModifiedDate.description: Timestamp when the breach was last modified in HIBP.

PwnCount.description: Number of breached accounts loaded into HIBP.

Description.description: HTML description of the breach returned by HIBP.

items.description: One compromised data class returned by HIBP.

DataClasses.description: Alphabetically ordered list of compromised data classes.

IsVerified.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as verified.

IsFabricated.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as fabricated.

IsSensitive.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as sensitive.

IsRetired.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as retired.

IsSpamList.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as a spam list.

IsMalware.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as malware-sourced.

IsSubscriptionFree.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as subscription-free.

IsStealerLog.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as sourced from stealer logs.

LogoPath.description: Logo URI or asset path returned by HIBP for the breached service.

anyOf.description: Optional attribution string returned by HIBP.

items.description: Full breach model returned by Have I Been Pwned.

breaches.description: Breaches returned by Have I Been Pwned.

outputSchema.description: Breach catalogue entries returned by Have I Been Pwned.

actions.name: list_data_classes
actions.description: List all data classes currently used by breaches in Have I Been Pwned.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing HIBP data classes.

items.description: One data class returned by HIBP.

outputSchema.description: Data classes returned by Have I Been Pwned.

actions.name: list_pastes_for_account
actions.description: List paste exposures for an email address from Have I Been Pwned.

emailAddress.description: Email address to search for paste exposures in HIBP.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing HIBP paste exposures for one email address.

Source.description: Paste service name returned by HIBP.

Id.description: Paste identifier returned by the source service.

anyOf.description: Paste title returned by HIBP when present.
Paste timestamp returned by HIBP when present.

EmailCount.description: Number of emails found in the paste.

items.description: Paste model returned by Have I Been Pwned.

pastes.description: Paste exposures returned by HIBP for the requested email address.

outputSchema.description: Paste exposures returned by Have I Been Pwned.

actions.name: search_breached_account
actions.description: Search full HIBP breach models for an email address, with optional domain and unverified-breach filters.

emailAddress.description: Email address to search in Have I Been Pwned.

domain.description: Optional domain filter applied to the breached account search.

includeUnverified.description: Whether to include breaches flagged as unverified in the HIBP account search.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching breaches for one email address in HIBP.

Name.description: Stable breach name returned by HIBP.

Title.description: Display title of the breach returned by HIBP.

Domain.description: Primary domain associated with the breach.

BreachDate.description: Date when the breach occurred in YYYY-MM-DD format.

AddedDate.description: Timestamp when the breach was added to HIBP.

ModifiedDate.description: Timestamp when the breach was last modified in HIBP.

PwnCount.description: Number of breached accounts loaded into HIBP.

Description.description: HTML description of the breach returned by HIBP.

items.description: One compromised data class returned by HIBP.

DataClasses.description: Alphabetically ordered list of compromised data classes.

IsVerified.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as verified.

IsFabricated.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as fabricated.

IsSensitive.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as sensitive.

IsRetired.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as retired.

IsSpamList.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as a spam list.

IsMalware.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as malware-sourced.

IsSubscriptionFree.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as subscription-free.

IsStealerLog.description: Whether HIBP marks the breach as sourced from stealer logs.

LogoPath.description: Logo URI or asset path returned by HIBP for the breached service.

anyOf.description: Optional attribution string returned by HIBP.

items.description: Full breach model returned by Have I Been Pwned.

breaches.description: Full breach models returned by HIBP for the requested email address.

outputSchema.description: Breach search results returned by Have I Been Pwned.
